help.title: Help Center
help.supportTeamHere: Our support team is here to assist you
help.gettingStartedDesc: New to Thulo Bazaar? Start here.
help.postingAdsDesc: Learn how to create effective ads.
help.buyingDesc: Tips for safe and smart buying.
help.paymentsPromotionsDesc: Understand our payment and promotion options.
help.safetySecurityDesc: Stay safe while buying and selling.
help.a1: Thulo Bazaar is Nepal's leading online classifieds marketplace where you can buy, sell, and rent items across all categories including vehicles, property, electronics, fashion, and services.
help.q2: How do I create an account?
help.a2: Tap on "Sign Up" from the menu, enter your phone number, verify with OTP, and complete your profile. You can also sign up with Google for a quicker process.
help.q3: Is it free to use Thulo Bazaar?
help.a3: Yes! Creating an account and browsing ads is completely free. Posting standard ads is also free. Premium features like Featured Ads and promotions are available for a fee.
help.q4: What can I sell on Thulo Bazaar?
help.a4: You can sell a wide variety of items including electronics, vehicles, property, fashion, home goods, services, and more. Check our categories for the full list.
help.q5: How do I post an ad?
help.a5: Tap the "+" button, select a category, fill in the details (title, description, price, photos), add your location and contact info, then submit.
help.a6: Ads may be rejected for: inappropriate content, misleading information, wrong category, poor quality images, or violation of our posting guidelines.
help.q7: How many photos can I upload?
help.a7: You can upload up to 10 photos per ad. High-quality photos with good lighting will attract more buyers.
help.q8: How long will my ad stay active?
help.a8: Standard ads remain active for 30 days. You can renew or edit your ad from the Dashboard.
help.q9: Can I edit my ad after posting?
help.a9: Yes, you can edit your ad anytime from your Dashboard. Changes may need re-approval by our team.
help.q10: How do I contact a seller?
help.a10: Tap on any ad to view details, then use the "Message" button to chat directly with the seller.
help.q11: Is it safe to buy on Thulo Bazaar?
help.a11: We recommend meeting sellers in public places, inspecting items before payment, and using secure payment methods. Look for verified sellers for added trust.
help.q12: How do I report a suspicious ad or seller?
help.a12: Tap the "Report" button on any ad page or user profile. Our moderation team reviews all reports within 24 hours.
help.a13: Yes, most sellers are open to negotiation. Use the chat feature to discuss pricing directly with the seller.
help.q14: How do I verify my account?
help.a14: Go to your Profile and look for the Verification section. You can verify as an Individual (with ID) or as a Business (with registration documents).
help.q15: How do I reset my password?
help.a15: Tap "Sign In", then "Forgot Password". Enter your phone number and follow the OTP verification steps to set a new password.
help.q16: How do I delete my account?
help.a16: Go to Profile > Security > Delete Account. Please note this action is permanent and cannot be undone.
help.a17: Business accounts are for registered businesses and dealers. They get a verified badge, custom shop page, and enhanced visibility.
help.q18: What payment methods do you accept?
help.a18: We accept eSewa, Khalti, bank transfers, and other popular payment methods in Nepal for premium features and promotions.
help.a19: Featured Ads appear at the top of search results and category pages for maximum visibility. This premium placement helps sell items faster.
help.q20: How do Urgent and Sticky tags work?
help.a20: Urgent tags add a visible badge to your ad indicating time-sensitivity. Sticky tags keep your ad pinned at the top of its category.
help.q21: Can I get a refund for promotions?
help.a21: Refunds are available within 24 hours of purchase if the promotion hasn't been activated. Contact support for refund requests.
help.q22: How can I stay safe when meeting buyers/sellers?
help.a22: Always meet in public places during daylight hours. Bring a friend if possible. Never share personal financial information.
help.q23: What should I do if I encounter fraud?
help.a23: Report the user immediately through our platform. Contact our support team and, if necessary, file a report with local authorities.
help.q24: How does Thulo Bazaar protect my data?
help.a24: We use industry-standard encryption and security practices to protect your personal information. Read our Privacy Policy for details.
help.q25: Why do some users have verification badges?
help.a25: Verification badges indicate the user has verified their identity or business registration. This helps build trust between buyers and sellers.
